SEARCH
Package search

Class Gateway

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
search.Gateway
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Remote, GatewayInterface
@Service public class Gateway extends UnicastRemoteObject implements GatewayInterface
This class represents the gateway of the system. It is responsible for managing the barrels and clients, as well as the queue of URLs to be indexed. It also provides methods for searching and adding URLs to the index.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form
